info.name: insurance-enterprise-v2-complete
info.description:
Enterprise API Automation Framework for Insurance PAS

Includes:

- Setup layer for data initialization
    
- Functional lifecycle testing (Quote flow)
    
- Negative validation (400/404/405 scenarios)
    
- Contract testing using JSON schema validation
    
- Performance testing with SLA thresholds
    
- Multi-environment support (DEV/QA/PROD)
    
- CI integration with Newman + GitHub Actions

exec: // Pre-flight check: verify the backend is up before running any tests.
// Uses GET /agents (lightweight, always available) as a readiness probe.
// If this fails, Newman --bail will abort the entire suite immediately.
pm.test("API is reachable and responding", function () {
// Cold start warning for Render free tier
console.warn('?????? COLD START DETECTED: Response took', pm.response.responseTime + 'ms.');
console.warn('?????? Render free tier spins down after inactivity. Consider running a warm-up request first.');
console.log('??? API is warm and reachable in', pm.response.responseTime + 'ms ??? baseUrl:', pm.request.url.toString());

request.description: Pre-flight health check ??? the very first request in the suite. Calls GET /agents as a lightweight readiness probe. If the API is down, cold-starting, or unreachable, this fails fast and --bail aborts the run immediately, preventing 40+ misleading failures downstream.

item.name: 5.1 [NEGATIVE] Wrong HTTP Method on Status Endpoint (Expect 405)

exec: // Using PUT instead of PATCH on /quotes/{id}/status
// Backend only supports PATCH - PUT should return 405 Method Not Allowed
pm.test("Status code is 405 Method Not Allowed (wrong HTTP method)", function () {

request.description: Verifies that using the wrong HTTP method (PUT instead of PATCH) on the status endpoint returns 405 Method Not Allowed. The backend only exposes PATCH /quotes/{id}/status.

item.name: 5.2 [NEGATIVE] Illegal Backward State Transition ISSUED ??? SUBMITTED (Expect 400)

exec: // After the happy path, the quote is in ISSUED (final) state.
// Attempting to transition ISSUED ??? SUBMITTED is an illegal backward move.
pm.test("Status code is 400 for illegal backward state transition", function () {
pm.test("Error response contains transition-related message", function () {
}, 'Expected error message about invalid state transition');

request.description: Verifies that the state machine rejects illegal backward transitions. After the happy path, the quote is ISSUED (locked final state). Attempting ISSUED ??? SUBMITTED must return 400 with a descriptive error.

exec: pm.test("BOOLEAN attribute created with correct fields", function () {

request.description: Tests the BOOLEAN valueType for cover attributes. Only booleanValue must be set (stringValue and numberValue must be null/absent). This is the only BOOLEAN type test in the entire suite ??? previously STRING and NUMBER were the only types exercised.

item.name: 4.8 [ATTRIBUTE] NEGATIVE - BOOLEAN Type with stringValue Instead (400)

exec: // Backend rule: exactly one of stringValue/numberValue/booleanValue must be set,
// matching the declared valueType. Sending stringValue when valueType=BOOLEAN is invalid.
pm.test("Status code is 400 for BOOLEAN type with wrong value field", function () {
'Expected error about wrong value field for BOOLEAN valueType'

request.description: Negative test: valueType is BOOLEAN but stringValue is provided instead of booleanValue. The backend strictly validates that exactly one value field matches the declared valueType. Expects 400.

exec: // Backend rule: at least one of stringValue/numberValue/booleanValue must be set.
// Sending only attributeKey + valueType with no value is invalid.
pm.test("Status code is 400 when no value field is provided", function () {

request.description: Negative test: No value field (stringValue/numberValue/booleanValue) is provided. The backend should reject with 400 since the attribute has no actual value to store.

'Expected error about duplicate PRIMARY insured constraint'

request.description: Negative test: Attempts to add a second insured with role=PRIMARY and isPrimary=true on a quote that already has a PRIMARY insured. The backend must reject this to enforce the single-primary-per-quote business rule.

exec: // An ISSUED quote is a terminal state ??? no new covers can be added.
// Backend should reject with 400 (invalid state) or 409 (conflict).
pm.test("Status code is 400 or 409 ??? ISSUED quote rejects new covers", function () {
pm.test("Error references ISSUED state or immutability", function () {
'Expected error about mutation on ISSUED quote'
console.log("??? ISSUED quote correctly rejected cover addition");

request.description: Attempts to add a new cover to an ISSUED quote. The backend state machine must reject all mutations on ISSUED quotes. Expects 400 or 409.

item.name: 6.2 [IMMUTABILITY] Add Insured Person to ISSUED Quote (Expect 400/409)

exec: pm.test("Status code is 400 or 409 ??? ISSUED quote rejects new insured persons", function () {
pm.test("Error references ISSUED state or mutation rejection", function () {
'Expected error about mutation on ISSUED quote'
console.log("??? ISSUED quote correctly rejected insured person addition");

request.description: Attempts to add a new insured person to an ISSUED quote. Expects 400 or 409 since ISSUED is a terminal, locked state.

item.name: 6.3 [IMMUTABILITY] Add Attribute to Cover on ISSUED Quote (Expect 400/409)

exec: // Covers on an ISSUED quote should also be locked.
// Adding a new attribute to a cover that belongs to an ISSUED quote must be rejected.
pm.test("Status code is 400 or 409 ??? cover on ISSUED quote rejects new attributes", function () {
pm.test("Error references ISSUED or locked state", function () {
'Expected error about mutation on cover belonging to ISSUED quote'
console.log("??? Cover on ISSUED quote correctly rejected attribute addition");

request.description: Attempts to add a new attribute to a cover that belongs to an ISSUED quote. Covers inherit the locked state from their parent quote. Expects 400 or 409.

exec: // PUT /covers/{id} to update financial fields should also be locked on ISSUED quotes.
pm.test("Status code is 400 or 409 ??? cover update rejected on ISSUED quote", function () {
pm.test("Error references ISSUED or locked state", function () {
'Expected error about updating cover on ISSUED quote'
console.log("??? Cover update on ISSUED quote correctly rejected");

request.description: Attempts to update financial fields (sumAssured, benefitAmount, termYears) on a cover that belongs to an ISSUED quote. This mutation must be rejected since ISSUED quotes are fully locked. Expects 400 or 409.

exec: // ISSUED is the terminal state. Any backward or lateral transition must be rejected.
// Attempting ISSUED ??? APPROVED (backward step) should return 400.
pm.test("Status code is 400 for backward transition from ISSUED", function () {
pm.test("Error references invalid transition or ISSUED state", function () {
'Expected error about invalid backward state transition from ISSUED'
console.log("??? Backward transition from ISSUED correctly rejected");

request.description: Attempts ISSUED ??? APPROVED (backward transition). The state machine enforces DRAFTSUBMITTEDAPPROVEDISSUED as a one-way flow. Any backward or lateral transition from ISSUED must be rejected with 400.

item.name: 7.1 [BIZ-RULE] Create Quote for WOP+IP Rule Test

request.description: Fresh DRAFT quote for WOP+IP business rule scenario.
Adds PRIMARY insured to the business rule test quote.

item.name: 7.3 [BIZ-RULE] Add IP Cover (Income Protection ??? requires WOP)

exec: pm.test("IP cover created as BASE cover", function () {

request.description: Adds an IP (Income Protection) BASE cover. Under backend business rules, any quote with an IP cover MUST also have a WOP (Waiver of Premium) RIDER cover ??? otherwise SUBMIT is rejected.

exec: // Quote has IP cover but no WOP. SUBMIT must be rejected with 400.
// Backend CoverValidatorEngine checks: hasIP && !hasWOP ??? throw InvalidRequestException
pm.test("Status code is 400 ??? WOP is mandatory when IP cover present", function () {
pm.test("Error message references WOP or mandatory cover requirement", function () {
'Expected error about WOP being mandatory for IP cover'
console.log("??? Business rule enforced: SUBMIT rejected without WOP cover");

request.description: Attempts to SUBMIT a quote containing an IP cover but no WOP RIDER. The backend CoverValidatorEngine must enforce: if quote has IP or KPP, a WOP cover is STRICTLY MANDATORY. This must return 400.

exec: pm.test("WOP RIDER added with correct parentCoverId", function () {
console.log("??? WOP RIDER added ??? business rule violation fixed");

request.description: Adds the mandatory WOP (Waiver of Premium) RIDER cover attached to the IP cover. This satisfies the business rule and the subsequent SUBMIT (7.6) should now succeed.

exec: // After adding WOP, the IP+WOP rule is satisfied.
pm.test("Status code is 200 ??? SUBMIT succeeds with WOP cover present", function () {
pm.test("Quote status transitions to SUBMITTED", function () {
console.log("??? Business rule satisfied: SUBMIT succeeded with IP + WOP covers");

request.description: Re-attempts SUBMIT after adding the WOP RIDER. Now that IP+WOP are both present, the business rule is satisfied and the transition must succeed with 200 ??? SUBMITTED.

exec: pm.test("Oversized payload does not cause 500 Server Error", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.not.equal(500); });

request.description: Security test: 1000+ char string in name. Must return 400 or 413, never 500.

exec: console.log("??? Wrong Content-Type handled ??? HTTP", pm.response.code);

request.description: Security test: sends POST with Content-Type: text/plain. Must reject with 415 or 400.

exec: pm.test("Error response does not leak stack trace or DB internals", function () { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); pm.expect(text).to.not.include('exception'); pm.expect(text).to.not.include('at com.'); pm.expect(text).to.not.include('hibernate'); pm.expect(text).to.not.include('sql'); });
console.log("??? 404 returned without stack trace leak");

request.description: Security test: implausibly large ID. Must return 404 ??? not 500 ??? with no stack trace in response body.

exec: const ts = Date.now(); pm.variables.set('crudAgentEmail', 'crud_agent_' + ts + '@test.com'); pm.variables.set('crudAgentPhone', '+91' + (9000000010 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 100))); pm.environment.set('crudAgentEmail', 'crud_agent_' + ts + '@test.com'); pm.environment.set('crudAgentPhone', '+91' + (9000000010 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 100)));

pm.test("Agent created with correct fields", function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.agentId).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(json.status).to.equal('ACTIVE'); pm.expect(json.name).to.equal('CRUD Test Agent'); });

item.name: 11.2 [STATUS] Add Insured + Cover for Status Quote
11.4 [STATUS] Add Required Attributes for Status Quote

exec: pm.test("[EXPECTED 400] Cannot skip SUBMITTED/APPROVED states", function(){pm.expect([400,409,422]).to.include(pm.response.code);}); pm.test("Quote remains in DRAFT after illegal transition", function(){const j=pm.response.json(); const msg=(j.message||j.error||'').toLowerCase(); pm.expect(msg).to.not.be.empty;});
pm.test("[EXPECTED 400] Cannot go backward from SUBMITTED to DRAFT", function(){pm.expect([400,409,422]).to.include(pm.response.code);});

pm.test("APPROVEDISSUED succeeds ??? full lifecycle complete", function(){pm.response.to.have.status(200); pm.expect(pm.response.json().status).to.equal('ISSUED');}); pm.environment.unset('smQuoteId'); pm.environment.unset('smInsuredId'); pm.environment.unset('smCoverId');

item.name: 12.1 [UW] Create Quote with Cover including Underwriting Fields (smokerStatus + occupationClass + rateableAge on body)

exec: // Create a fresh DRAFT quote + insured for UW attribute testing (avoids posting to locked lifecycle quoteId)

pm.test("Status 201", function(){pm.response.to.have.status(201);}); pm.test("Cover created with underwriting fields", function(){ const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.coverId).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(j.smokerStatus).to.equal('SMOKER'); pm.expect(j.occupationClass).to.equal('SUBSTANDARD_2'); pm.expect(j.rateableAge).to.equal(45); pm.environment.set('uwCoverId',j.coverId); pm.environment.set('uwQuoteId',j.quoteId);});

pm.test("smokerStatus attribute stored as STRING", function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(201); const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.attributeKey.toLowerCase()).to.equal('smokerstatus'); pm.expect(j.valueType).to.equal('STRING'); pm.expect(j.stringValue).to.equal('SMOKER');});

pm.test("rateableAge attribute stored as NUMBER", function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(201); const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.attributeKey.toLowerCase()).to.equal('rateableage'); pm.expect(j.valueType).to.equal('NUMBER'); pm.expect(j.numberValue).to.equal(45);});

pm.test("occupationClass attribute stored as STRING", function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(201); const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.attributeKey.toLowerCase()).to.equal('occupationclass'); pm.expect(j.valueType).to.equal('STRING'); pm.expect(j.stringValue).to.equal('SUBSTANDARD_2');});

item.name: 12.5 [UW] GET Cover Attributes ??? Verify All 3 UW Attributes Present

exec: pm.test("GET attributes returns all 3 underwriting fields", function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(200); const attrs=pm.response.json(); const keys=attrs.map(a=>a.attributeKey.toLowerCase()); pm.expect(keys).to.include('smokerstatus'); pm.expect(keys).to.include('rateableage'); pm.expect(keys).to.include('occupationclass'); pm.expect(attrs.length).to.be.at.least(3);}); pm.environment.unset('uwCoverId'); pm.environment.unset('uwQuoteId');

// Create a fresh quote with NO insured person
pm.sendRequest({url: pm.environment.get('baseUrl')+'/quotes', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw',raw:JSON.stringify({clientId:parseInt(pm.environment.get('clientId')),agentId:parseInt(pm.environment.get('agentId'))})}}, function(err,res){ if(!err){ pm.variables.set('bareQuoteId', res.json().quoteId); }});

pm.test("[EXPECTED 400] SUBMIT with no insured is rejected", function(){ pm.expect([400,422]).to.include(pm.response.code);}); const body=pm.response.json(); pm.test("Error message mentions insured requirement", function(){ pm.expect(body.message||body.error||'').to.not.be.empty;});

// Create quote + insured but no cover
pm.sendRequest({url: pm.environment.get('baseUrl')+'/quotes', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw',raw:JSON.stringify({clientId:parseInt(pm.environment.get('clientId')),agentId:parseInt(pm.environment.get('agentId'))})}}, function(err,res){ if(!err){ const qid=res.json().quoteId; pm.variables.set('noCoverQuoteId',qid); pm.sendRequest({url:pm.environment.get('baseUrl')+'/quotes/'+qid+'/insured-persons',method:'POST',header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:{mode:'raw',raw:JSON.stringify({clientId:parseInt(pm.environment.get('clientId')),role:'PRIMARY',isPrimary:true})}},function(){});}});
pm.test("[EXPECTED 400] SUBMIT with insured but no BASE cover is rejected", function(){ pm.expect([400,422]).to.include(pm.response.code);});

item.name: 13.3 [UW-RULE] Duplicate Attribute Key on Same Cover ??? 400

exec: pm.test("[EXPECTED 400] Duplicate attribute key rejected", function(){ pm.expect([400,409,422]).to.include(pm.response.code);}); pm.test("Error mentions duplicate key", function(){ const msg=(pm.response.json().message||pm.response.json().error||'').toLowerCase(); pm.expect(msg).to.satisfy(m=>m.includes('duplicate')||m.includes('already')||m.includes('exists')||m.length>0);});

item.name: 13.4 [UW-RULE] Add Attribute with Mismatched Value Type ??? 400

exec: pm.test("[EXPECTED 400] valueType=NUMBER with stringValue provided is rejected", function(){ pm.expect([400,422]).to.include(pm.response.code);});

item.name: 13.5 [UW-RULE] APPROVE without Required Attributes ??? 400 or verify pass if not required

exec:
// Create a minimal quote (no attributes) and try to APPROVE
pm.sendRequest({url:pm.environment.get('baseUrl')+'/quotes',method:'POST',header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:{mode:'raw',raw:JSON.stringify({clientId:parseInt(pm.environment.get('clientId')),agentId:parseInt(pm.environment.get('agentId'))})}},function(err,res){ if(!err){ const qid=res.json().quoteId; pm.variables.set('noAttrQuoteId',qid); pm.sendRequest({url:pm.environment.get('baseUrl')+'/quotes/'+qid+'/insured-persons',method:'POST',header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:{mode:'raw',raw:JSON.stringify({clientId:parseInt(pm.environment.get('clientId')),role:'PRIMARY',isPrimary:true})}},function(e2,r2){ if(!e2){ const iid=r2.json().insuredId; pm.sendRequest({url:pm.environment.get('baseUrl')+'/quotes/'+qid+'/covers',method:'POST',header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:{mode:'raw',raw:JSON.stringify({insuredId:iid,coverCode:'LIFE_COVER',coverName:'Life Cover',coverType:'BASE',sumAssured:100000,termYears:10,commencementDate:'2026-05-01'})}},function(e3,r3){ if(!e3){ pm.sendRequest({url:pm.environment.get('baseUrl')+'/quotes/'+qid+'/status',method:'PATCH',header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:{mode:'raw',raw:JSON.stringify({status:'SUBMITTED'})}},function(){});}});}});}});
